> [!NOTE] > ## Reviews paused > > It looks like this branch is under active development. To avoid overwhelming you with review comments due to an influx of new commits, CodeRabbit has automatically paused this review. You can configure this behavior by changing the `reviews.auto_review.auto_pause_after_reviewed_commits` setting. > > Use the following commands to manage reviews: > - `@coderabbitai resume` to resume automatic reviews. > - `@coderabbitai review` to trigger a single review. > > Use the checkboxes below for quick actions: > - [ ] ▶️ Resume reviews > - [ ] 🔍 Trigger review
📝 Walkthrough ## Walkthrough Adds documentation, dataset manifests and tooling; introduces a BaseAgentRunner abstraction with lifecycle/timing/stats and LangChain runner adjustments; computes ε-robustness in reliability logic and adds task variants; provides analysis scripts (figures/tables), HF dataset tooling, many run artifacts, and CI/container/make infrastructure. ## Changes |Cohort / File(s)|Summary| |---|---| |**Docs & Governance**
`CHANGELOG.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, `DATASHEET.md`, `README.md`, `paper/ED_TRACK_GUIDELINES.md`|Add changelog, contribution guide, datasheet, HF paper guidance, and small README wording changes.| |**Repo Config & Build**
`.gitignore`, `Dockerfile`, `Makefile`, `pyproject.toml`, `config/llm/gemini-3-flash.yaml`|Refine ignore rules (runs/logs, paper LaTeX outputs), add Dockerfile, Makefile targets (install/test/lint/eval/docker), update extras and dev deps, and add Gemini LLM config.| |**Dataset Manifests & HF Tooling**
`croissant.json`, `scripts/populate_croissant_hashes.py`, `scripts/hf_dataset_card.md`, `scripts/upload_hf_dataset.sh`|Add Croissant manifest, SHA256 population script, HF dataset card, and upload/staging script.| |**Evaluation Core & Runners**
`evaluation/base_runner.py`, `evaluation/_archive/runners/...`, `evaluation/_archive/runners/langchain_runner.py`, `python/agentdisruptbench/cli.py`|Introduce `RunnerConfig` and `BaseAgentRunner` ABC with lifecycle/__call__/stats; adjust LangChain agent construction signature; update CLI help text.| |**Reliability & Tasks**
`python/agentdisruptbench/core/reliability.py`, `python/agentdisruptbench/tasks/builtin/variants.yaml`|Add helpers to derive base task IDs and compute ε-robustness; add multi-domain task variants YAML.| |**Result Analysis & Visualization**
`scripts/generate_figures.py`, `scripts/generate_tables.py`, `paper/tables/*.tex`|Add scripts to generate publication figures and LaTeX tables from run JSONs; add LaTeX table sources.| |**Baseline & Utility Scripts**
`scripts/run_baselines.sh`, `scripts/upload_hf_dataset.sh`, `scripts/populate_croissant_hashes.py`|Add baseline orchestration, HF upload helper, and dataset-hash population utilities.| |**Run Artifacts & Reports**
`runs/.../*` (many `runs//{results.json,summary.json,report.md}`), `rac_out.txt`|Add numerous run result, summary and report artifacts; remove an old `rac_out.txt`.| |**UI / CLI Helpers**
`evaluation/compare_runs.py`, `evaluation/show_run.py`, `python/agentdisruptbench/harness/reporter.py`|Update run labeling to include runner, enrich show_run with task registry/ground-truth and newer disruption keys, remove agent-output truncation, and ensure reports end with newline/spacing tweaks.| |**Misc repo files**
`plans/...` (deleted), `pr8_issue_comments.json`|Remove old planning docs; add a JSON PR/comment artifact.| ## Sequence Diagram(s) ```mermaid sequenceDiagram participant Caller as Caller participant Runner as BaseAgentRunner participant Tools as ToolProvider participant Stats as StatsStore Caller->>Runner: __call__(task, tools) Note right of Runner: lazy setup / reset metrics Runner->>Runner: if not setup -> setup() Runner->>Stats: reset per-task metrics Runner->>Runner: start timer Runner->>Tools: invoke tool calls (as needed) Tools-->>Runner: tool responses / errors Runner->>Runner: run_task(task, tools) Runner->>Stats: update tokens/time/api-calls/recovery info Runner->>Runner: stop timer Runner-->>Caller: return result (string) ``` ## Estimated code review effort 🎯 4 (Complex) | ⏱️ ~45 minutes ## Possibly related PRs - **Kavirubc/AgentDisruptBench#5**: Overlaps on evaluation runner and LLM/config surface—related to runner/LLM wiring. - **Kavirubc/AgentDisruptBench#3**: Related to reliability computation changes in `core/reliability.py`. - **Kavirubc/AgentDisruptBench#7**: Related to `evaluation/show_run.py` runtime/renderer and CLI updates. ## Poem > 🐰 I hopped through manifests, YAML and charts, > I stitched up runners and counted their parts, > Croissants hashed, tables aligned in rows, > Logs and scripts gathered where resilience grows, > A tiny hop—now the bench quietly starts.
🚥 Pre-merge checks | ✅ 3

The required threshold is 80.00%. |
✏️ Tip: You can configure your own custom pre-merge checks in the settings.
